generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you see how the EU's reliance on foreign tech left them vulnerable to cyberattacks last month? Our strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-reliant—it's about protecting ourselves from these very real threats. When we depend on others for critical infrastructure, we're putting our national security in someone else's hands. It's time to invest in our own capabilities before it's too late. #NationalSecurityFirst
